product_overview: Sentimeter is a developer-first feedback collection system that lets end-users submit quick reactions via embedded widgets and lets developers view aggregated analytics on a protected dashboard. This PRD covers landing, auth, and dashboard smoke flows for automated E2E tests.
core_goals: Provide a public marketing landing page with clear sign-in and sign-up CTAs
Allow visitors to authenticate via Clerk (sign-in and sign-up)
Protect the developer dashboard so only authenticated users can view it and see their email/avatar
Ensure correct redirect behavior for protected routes (signed-out -> /sign-in)
Surface basic dashboard UI and placeholder stats without runtime crashes

features.name: Signed-out navigation
features.description: Allow visitors to browse the landing page and access Clerk-powered sign-in and sign-up pages without authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See landing page with Sign In CTA -> Click Sign In CTA -> Navigate to /sign-in -> See Clerk sign-in widget
Navigate to / -> See landing page with Sign Up CTA -> Click Sign Up CTA -> Navigate to /sign-up -> See Clerk sign-up widget
Navigate to /dashboard while signed out -> Get redirected to /sign-in -> See Clerk sign-in widget

features.name: Protected dashboard
features.description: Authenticated developers can access /dashboard to view a top nav with avatar/email, a welcome headline, and placeholder analytics; signed-out users are redirected to sign-in.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-in -> Use Clerk sign-in widget to authenticate -> After successful sign-in, Navigate to /dashboard -> See dashboard header with user avatar and user email visible -> See welcome headline and placeholder stats (—)
Navigate to /dashboard while signed out -> Get redirected to /sign-in -> See Clerk sign-in widget
Sign in via Clerk -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See dashboard page load without runtime crashes -> Observe placeholder metrics shown as dashes (—) indicating backend data not yet available

features.name: Signed-out navigation
features.description: Visitor can browse landing page and access Clerk auth pages
user_interactions: Click Sign In and view Clerk sign-in widget
Click Sign Up and view Clerk sign-up widget

features.name: Protected dashboard
features.description: Signed-in user can access dashboard; signed-out users are redirected
user_interactions: Visit /dashboard while signed out and get redirected to /sign-in
Sign in via Clerk and view /dashboard with email visible

known_limitations.impact: Stats show dashes (—) rather than real data
